name: open-rgs-examples
description: A gallery of worked open-rgs games — Limbo, Dice, Plinko, Mines, Tower, Chicken Road, Crash, Blackjack — each one bootable with `bun run dev` and math-testable with the simulator.

scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit -p packages/mock-platform && tsc --noEmit -p packages/meta-platform && tsc --noEmit -p packages/lua-kit && tsc --noEmit -p tools/play && tsc --noEmit -p tools/simulator && tsc --noEmit -p tools/attack && tsc --noEmit -p tools/autotune && tsc --noEmit -p games/limbo && tsc --noEmit -p games/dice && tsc --noEmit -p games/plinko && tsc --noEmit -p games/mines && tsc --noEmit -p games/tower && tsc --noEmit -p games/chicken-road && tsc --noEmit -p games/crash && tsc --noEmit -p games/blackjack && tsc --noEmit -p games/slots-classic && tsc --noEmit -p games/slots-meta
